args:
set -eu
measure_dir=$(mktemp -d)
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- measure prefill-path --out "$measure_dir" >/dev/null
python3 - "$measure_dir/measurement_report.json" <<'PY'
import json, sys
obj = json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))
assert obj['broad_cold']['unique_artifact_bytes'] > obj['scoped_cold']['unique_artifact_bytes']
assert obj['scoped_vs_broad']['bytes_written_delta'] > 0
assert obj['warm_vs_cold']['reused_artifact_delta'] >= 0
PY
printf 'memory-measure-report-growth\n'
